$schema_note: Rehab cost anchors used by Phase 4B (Rehab Calibration). Per-sqft rate driven by overall property condition × per-market multiplier. Values reflect Bible v3 §4.2 (5/11/2026). Refine as real bids land. Truth hierarchy: validation cases > Alex override > this file.

scope_band_spread._note: Width of the low/mid/high band as a fraction of mid. Tighter when condition is well-evidenced (more photos, higher Vision confidence).
